## 鑷缁撴灉
- [ ] plugin.json 瀛楁瀹屾暣锛坣ame, description, version, author, license, skills锛?
- [ ] SKILL.md frontmatter 鏈夋晥锛坣ame, description锛?
- [ ] 鏃犳畫鐣欒皟璇曚唬鐮?
